acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.diffReviewed set to false.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker requires verificationEvidence.diffReviewed to equal true, and the diffReviewed=false negative smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.completionReportReviewed set to false.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker requires verificationEvidence.completionReportReviewed to equal true, and the completionReportReviewed=false negative smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check rejects audit reports with verificationEvidence.verificationEvidenceReviewed set to false.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker requires verificationEvidence.verificationEvidenceReviewed to equal true, and the verificationEvidenceReviewed=false negative smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing committed audit reports pass the stricter contract.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter true-only verificationEvidence contract.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and focused negative smokes for false verification flags.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Evidence under evidence/m4-qd-audit-verification-boolean-contract/ records the qd report check, full check, git diff --check, checker line count, and one focused false-value negative smoke per verificationEvidence flag.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: This change is limited to qd report metadata validation and makes no macOS-specific product claim.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report validation only; no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
